overall.description: Gameplay footage from Bloodborne showing a hunter character exploring a dark gothic cathedral. The character walks through torch-lit stone corridors, overlooks a balcony, ascends stairs, crosses a foggy bridge, and enters a large boss arena with ornate architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral corridor with balcony overlook

events.description: reaching balcony overlooking lower cathedral level
turning away from balcony to continue through corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through dark stone corridor and pausing at balcony to look down at lower level

entered.detail: dark gothic stone walls with ornate carvings and columns
lit torch sconces providing warm orange light
stone balustrade overlooking lower cathedral level
metal cage elevator structure visible from balcony

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a torch-lit stone corridor with gothic architecture. Approaching a balcony, the camera pauses to overlook a lower level with a metal cage structure visible, then turns back to continue through the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral stairwell ascending to upper levels

events.description: beginning ascent of wide stone staircase
lighting shifts as stairs approach upper level windows

agents.ego_description: walking through corridors and ascending a wide stone staircase toward upper cathedral levels

entered.detail: wide worn stone stairs with high steps
fallen dead body lying on floor near stairs
ornate pointed arch at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: Leaving the balcony behind, the character continues through stone corridors and begins ascending a wide staircase. A fallen corpse lies near the stairs as the character climbs toward a gothic archway at the top.

events.description: entering fog-filled archway with thick mist
stepping onto elevated metal bridge surrounded by fog

agents.ego_description: walking through thick fog across a metal bridge and continuing through misty corridors

entered.detail: thick white fog obscuring distant views and creating atmosphere
elevated metal walkway with railings spanning a chasm
decorative stone balustrades along the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a gothic archway into a fog-filled area. Crossing an elevated metal bridge surrounded by thick mist, the scene takes on an ethereal quality as the character continues through the cloudy corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark cathedral corridor with ornate railings

events.description: exiting fog into darker corridor with reduced visibility
entering ornate hallway with decorative stonework approaching boss arena

agents.ego_description: walking through dark corridors and ornate hallways approaching a large chamber entrance

entered.detail: narrow passage with minimal lighting and shadows
large doorway leading to vast chamber ahead

segments.scene_description: Exiting the fog into a darker corridor, the character walks through an ornate hallway with decorative railings. The environment becomes more ominous as the character approaches the entrance to a large boss arena.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand cathedral boss arena with central altar

events.description: entering vast boss arena with high gothic ceilings
approaching glowing purple loot item on the ground near altar

agents.ego_description: entering a vast cathedral chamber and approaching a glowing item near the central altar

entered.detail: vast open chamber with high gothic ceilings and ornate architecture
large stone altar with candles at the far end of the chamber
purple glowing loot item on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a massive boss arena with towering gothic architecture and a high ceiling. Walking toward the central altar, the character approaches a glowing purple item on the ground, indicating loot or an important object.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic cathedral that transitions from torch-lit corridors into a misty void before opening into a massive arena. It begins by navigating a stone hallway, pausing briefly at a balcony to overlook a lower level with a metal cage before continuing forward. As the character leaves the balcony, the path leads past a fallen corpse and up a wide staircase toward a gothic archway. The scene then shifts into an ethereal, fog-filled expanse as the camera crosses an elevated metal bridge, eventually exiting the mist into an ominous, ornate hallway with decorative railings. Finally, the environment expands into a towering boss arena with a high ceiling, where the camera moves toward a glowing purple item resting near a central altar.
